DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JAMAL BISHARAT'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO CERTAIN OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE; ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION AS FOLLOWS; WITHIN THIRTY (30) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT WILL PROVIDE, WITHOUT OBJECTION EXCEPT AS TO A CLAIM OF ATTORNEY CLIENT PRIVILEGE, FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS NOS. 7, 10, 17, 19-24, 32, 39, 41, 43-45, 49, 57 & 63. TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANT IS WITHHOLDING ANY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS ON THE BASIS OF A/C PRIVILEGE IT WILL PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH A LOG IDENTIFYING EACH DOCUMENT WITH SUFFICIENT DETAIL TO PERMIT PLAINTIFF TO CHALLENGE THE CLAIM. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WERE SOUGHT AND NONE IS IMPOSED. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Mar-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Caitlin Scott, Esq. 310-929-4941 for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JAMAL BISHARAT's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One.

NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED TO PLAINTIFFS MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO CERTAIN OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE; ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION AS FOLLOWS; WITHIN THIRTY (30) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT WILL PROVIDE, WITHOUT OBJECTION EXCEPT AS TO A CLAIM OF ATTORNEY CLIENT PRIVILEGE, FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS NOS. 7, 10, 17, 19-24, 32, 39, 41, 43-45, 49, 57 & 63. TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANT IS WITHHOLDING ANY RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS ON THE BASIS OF A/C PRIVILEGE IT WILL PROVIDE PLAINTIFF WITH A LOG IDENTIFYING EACH DOCUMENT WITH SUFFICIENT DETAIL TO PERMIT PLAINTIFF TO CHALLENGE THE CLAIM. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WERE SOUGHT AND NONE IS IMPOSED.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Set For Trial On Oct-21-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
